#include <vector>
#include <queue>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

long long solve(vector<long long> nums) {
    int n = nums.size();
    if (n == 0) return 0;
    if (n == 1) return 0;

    const int max_num = 1e6;
    // Precompute sieve and SPF
    vector<bool> is_prime(max_num + 1, true);
    is_prime[0] = is_prime[1] = false;
    for (int i = 2; i*i <= max_num; ++i) {
        if (is_prime[i]) {
            for (int j = i*i; j <= max_num; j += i) {
                is_prime[j] = false;
            }
        }
    }

    vector<int> spf(max_num + 1, 0);
    for (int i = 2; i <= max_num; ++i) {
        if (spf[i] == 0) {
            spf[i] = i;
            for (int j = i * 2; j <= max_num; j += i) {
                if (spf[j] == 0) {
                    spf[j] = i;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Build prime_to_indices map
    unordered_map<int, vector<int>> prime_to_indices;
    for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) {
        long long num = nums[j];
        if (num == 1) continue;
        vector<int> factors;
        long long x = num;
        while (x != 1) {
            int p = spf[x];
            if (p != 0) {
                factors.push_back(p);
                while (x % p == 0) {
                    x /= p;
                }
            } else {
                // This should not happen since x is <= 1e6
                break;
            }
        }
        // Deduplicate factors
        set<int> unique_factors(factors.begin(), factors.end());
        for (int p : unique_factors) {
            prime_to_indices[p].push_back(j);
        }
    }

    // BFS
    vector<long long> distance(n, -1);
    queue<int> q;
    q.push(0);
    distance[0] = 0;

    while (!q.empty()) {
        int current = q.front();
        q.pop();

        if (current == n - 1) {
            return distance[current];
        }

        // Adjacent steps
        if (current - 1 >= 0 && distance[current - 1] == -1) {
            distance[current - 1] = distance[current] + 1;
            q.push(current - 1);
        }
        if (current + 1 < n && distance[current + 1] == -1) {
            distance[current + 1] = distance[current] + 1;
            q.push(current + 1);
        }

        // Teleportation if current is a prime
        if (is_prime[nums[current]]) {
            int p = nums[current];
            for (int j : prime_to_indices[p]) {
                if (j != current && distance[j] == -1) {
                    distance[j] = distance[current] + 1;
                    q.push(j);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return -1; // unreachable
}

#include <vector>
#include <queue>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

long long solve(vector<long long> nums) {
    int n = nums.size();
    if (n == 0) return 0;
    if (n == 1) return 0;

    const int max_num = 1e6;
    // Precompute sieve and SPF
    vector<bool> is_prime(max_num + 1, true);
    is_prime[0] = is_prime[1] = false;
    for (int i = 2; i*i <= max_num; ++i) {
        if (is_prime[i]) {
            for (int j = i*i; j <= max_num; j += i) {
                is_prime[j] = false;
            }
        }
    }

    vector<int> spf(max_num + 1, 0);
    for (int i = 2; i <= max_num; ++i) {
        if (spf[i] == 0) {
            spf[i] = i;
            for (int j = i * 2; j <= max_num; j += i) {
                if (spf[j] == 0) {
                    spf[j] = i;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Build prime_to_indices map
    unordered_map<int, vector<int>> prime_to_indices;
    for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) {
        long long num = nums[j];
        if (num == 1) continue;
        vector<int> factors;
        long long x = num;
        while (x != 1) {
            int p = spf[x];
            if (p != 0) {
                factors.push_back(p);
                while (x % p == 0) {
                    x /= p;
                }
            } else {
                // This should not happen since x is <= 1e6
                break;
            }
        }
        // Deduplicate factors
        set<int> unique_factors(factors.begin(), factors.end());
        for (int p : unique_factors) {
            prime_to_indices[p].push_back(j);
        }
    }

    // BFS
    vector<long long> distance(n, -1);
    queue<int> q;
    q.push(0);
    distance[0] = 0;

    while (!q.empty()) {
        int current = q.front();
        q.pop();

        if (current == n - 1) {
            return distance[current];
        }

        // Adjacent steps
        if (current - 1 >= 0 && distance[current - 1] == -1) {
            distance[current - 1] = distance[current] + 1;
            q.push(current - 1);
        }
        if (current + 1 < n && distance[current + 1] == -1) {
            distance[current + 1] = distance[current] + 1;
            q.push(current + 1);
        }

        // Teleportation if current is a prime
        if (is_prime[nums[current]]) {
            int p = nums[current];
            for (int j : prime_to_indices[p]) {
                if (j != current && distance[j] == -1) {
                    distance[j] = distance[current] + 1;
                    q.push(j);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return -1; // unreachable
}
